Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We need to construct a process tree for the given hospital patient management scenario. The description is detailed, so we need to translate it into a hierarchical structure using the operators: sequence (->), exclusive choice (X), parallel (+), and loop (*). The loop operator * (A, B) means: execute A, then either exit or execute B and then go back to A. So A is the do part, B is the redo part.

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: In the description, the loop involves: after initial diagnostic test (CE or FBP), if abnormal, then loop: SC, then exclusive choice between TM or SPT, then RDT (which is itself an exclusive choice between FCE or FBA), then if still abnormal, go back to SC. That is a loop where the do part is the sequence of SC -> (TM xor SPT) -> RDT

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: So the loop body A should be: sequence of SC, then exclusive choice between TM and SPT, then the re-diagnostic test which is exclusive choice between FCE and FBA. So A = -> ( SC, X (TM, SPT), X (FCE, FBA) )

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: if the results are normal, the loop is skipped and we go directly to the next steps. So after the initial diagnostic test, we have an XOR: either go into the loop or not. But the loop itself must end with normal results, and then proceed to the next steps. So the overall structure after the initial test is: an XOR between a direct path (tau) and a loop path.

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: First, steps 1-2: Arrival, Registration, Intake Assessment. Then Triage Interview and Triage Classification in sequence. So initial part: sequence of A, RG, IA, then TI, TC. sequence of five activities: A -> RG -> IA -> TI -> TC.

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: after TC, we have an exclusive choice between CE and FBP. So after the sequence of initial five activities, we have that XOR. Then after the initial diagnostic test (either CE or FBP), the process goes to the loop if abnormal, modeled with XOR(tau, loop).

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Next steps (step 5): parallel node with two leaves: AI and NC. Then after that, a sequence of (FAS, DDI) (step 6). Then step 7: a concurrency block for BL, ICP, MRF (three in parallel).

Name: Validation - PE
Text: double-check the process description: Step 4 says If the results are abnormal, a loop commences... This loop repeats... Once normal results are obtained, the loop ends. So indeed the loop body includes SC, treatment, RDT. And the redo is just going back. So our loop structure is correct.

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: overall root is a sequence of: (initial sequence), (initial test XOR), (XOR after test), (parallel AI/NC), (sequence FAS/DDI), (parallel BL/ICP/MRF). Represent as nested binary operators.
